description: Single-subject 'DEPORTED' card in ICE Denver's standard template: medium blue background with faint topographic line texture. The centered square photograph is a front-facing booking or intake portrait of a man with short dark hair and a thin mustache wearing a dark shirt, photographed inside an institutional room (window and fixtures visible behind him). A bold red banner across the bottom of the photo reads 'DEPORTED' in large white all caps. Below, large white serif type gives the name 'Rigoberto Carranza-Mendez', followed by smaller white text 'CONVICTED OF MURDER AND DUI AND HAS BEEN REMOVED FROM THE UNITED STATES.' ('MURDER AND DUI' bolded). Beneath that, spaced out faint capitals read 'DENVER', and the DHS seal with the 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' wordmark appears at the bottom.
notable_text: DEPORTED; Rigoberto Carranza-Mendez; CONVICTED OF MURDER AND DUI AND HAS BEEN REMOVED FROM THE UNITED STATES; DENVER
